They dragged him to Qom Central Prison, strapped the noose around that young neck, and dropped the floor while the world watched.

Given the growing antisemitism in this country, it is now or never to finish off Iran.  We'll never get the chance again.  Too many people will really believe it's for the Jews instead of stopping a really evil regime that wants to kill us all.  We cannot give up this fight.

So JOE KENT, Mister “No More Foreign Wars” actually LOVES FOREIGN WARS, especially the FOREVER WARS.  It’s in his BOOK.  Chapter ONE: “HUNTING HUMANS…is a beautiful ART.  I want Everyday to Pull The Trigger on ISIS, BELIEVE ME”—He wrote that in 2024-when “Forever Wars” and “America First” were, shall we say, IN THE NEWS a lot-but he wrote NOTHING about either in his Self Promotional Silly Book.  “MAGA” appears nowhere in his book. Dave Smith (@ComicDaveSmith)

What are you doing man? You’re a grandfather talking shit on twitter and losing every round? Seriously, what is this? 

Be a man. Have a conversation with one of your detractors. Make your argument. I’ll host you anytime. If I’m so wrong and evil, come

And along the way she has claimed Brigitte Macron was "born a man" — triggering a

Not just you.  Your entire Nazi party.

Is it just me or did you guys notice that Zionists lie about everyone and everything every God-damned time they speak?

Joe Kent _never_ blamed "Jews" or "the Jewish state," for anything. It's just that Greenblatt is a Zionist and so he is a liar.
